The best recommendations to this quiet little restaurant in the heart of Chinatown:the specialty soup is great - a lot of meat, broth is moderately salty(salt on the table), a good portion. The restaurant is quiet, clean and cozy. I write a lot of reviews in Google maps, and here I also recommend this restaurant to all tourist-local customers very much love this place.

I work in the area the Aunties at Golden Star have been feeding me for years. Their Cha Gio is the best in the city and will cure all kinds of bad days. Go warm your tummy and your heart over at Golden Star!
